CustomField.formula: IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'ClientRequest', ISPICKVAL(Pickup_type__c, 'Delivery') ), 'red', IF( OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'ClientRequest', AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'ClientRequest',ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Redelivery'))), 'green', IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'GeneralDelivery', ISPICKVAL(SubType__c, 'HOPE') ), 'purple', IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'DonationPickup', 'blue', IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'GeneralDelivery', 'orange', 'black') ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Color
